text.title: web-scraping-element-extraction Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for web-scraping-element-extraction as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Storing raw extracted strings like " $1,234.56\n" as the price field in your dataset.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every consumer must re-implement the same normalization; parse failures surface unpredictably at query time rather than at ingestion.

failure-mode.description: Using page.$eval without a null/optional-chain guard on the returned element property.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If the selector matches but the property is undefined (e.g., img without src), the extraction silently returns undefined and corrupts the row.
